aries:
♈ Aries

🔥 Energy: Charged but slightly reactive

💼 Career: Competition intense hoga, smart strategy zaruri hai

❤️ Love: Choti baat pe clash ho sakta hai

💰 Money: Risky investment avoid karo

🧘 Advice: React nahi, observe karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Har battle ladna zaruri nahi hota
taurus:
♉ Taurus

🔥 Energy: Grounded aur patient

💼 Career: Slow but steady progress milega

❤️ Love: Emotional stability strong hogi

💰 Money: Financial security ka feel aayega

🧘 Advice: Change ko resist mat karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Growth comfort ke bahar hoti hai
gemini:
♊ Gemini

🔥 Energy: Fast aur engaging

💼 Career: Communication se ek strong opportunity mil sakti hai

❤️ Love: Fun interaction bonding improve karega

💰 Money: Side income ka chance

🧘 Advice: Focus lose mat karo

⚡ Mauksh Truth: Attention hi tumhari real currency hai
